metadata.name: ZIP 76119 — Fort Worth, TX
metadata.source: US Census TIGER/Line ZCTA dataset (public domain)
metadata.envelopeNote: Provisional boundary envelope until T2.76 commits the full TIGER-extracted polygon. Coordinates approximate the published 76119 ZCTA outline within ~150m for visualization purposes; W2 Wave 1 verification uses the bounding rectangle.
